curation_notes: The patch modifies a single file (internal/handlers/handler_verify.go) in the VerifyGet function. The vulnerability is in the error handling path when parsing the target URL from the incoming request. The original code called ctx.Error() which returned a 200 OK status, while the fix replaces it with ctx.Logger.Error() and ctx.ReplyUnauthorized() to correctly return a 401. The pre-assigned class auth-bypass (from CWE-287) is correct — the bug allows bypassing authentication by sending a malformed request URI. No sibling files share this vulnerability pattern.
